name: Semi Flushmount Kids' Ceiling Light Black/Gold - Pillowfort™
description: Illuminate your kid's room in style with this Semi Flush Mount Ceiling Light from Pillowfort™. Set on a gold base, this flush mount ceiling light has black exterior and white interior to lend a modern appeal to the ceiling. With the dimmable light setting, this black and gold ceiling light helps them adjust the lighting according to their need.
